title: Crucianella exasperata

As a member of the Lamiaceae family, Crucianella exasperata shares similarities with other plants in this family, such as mint and basil. The Lamiaceae family is further divided into various subfamilies and tribes, with Crucianella exasperata likely belonging to the subfamily Nepetoideae. Further research may be necessary to determine the exact classification of Crucianella exasperata within the Lamiaceae family.
